title: Score Counter-Attack
description: Team A scores. Ball resets. Team B can immediately rush the reset point to create a new contest — no long dead-play interruption.

expected_outcomes.description: New contest is live within a few seconds of the reset. Team B can realistically rush and challenge.

must_not_outcomes.description: Goal triggers a ceremony or pause that removes the ability to immediately counter.

notes: The counter-rush after a goal is a core EFT tension pattern. The reset delay must be short enough that Team B can contest the reset ball if they commit immediately.
